    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddEditEmployeeDialogController
     
    Cashier
    Launches the cashier-facing JavaFX application window.
    cashierController
    Controller for the cashier point-of-sale JavaFX view.
    CashierController
     
    cashierModel
    Data and persistence model for the cashier workflow.
    cashierModel.InventoryOption
    Inventory option DTO used by the Add Menu Item ingredient dropdown.
    cashierModel.RecipeIngredient
    Immutable ingredient mapping used when creating recipe associations.
    DatabaseApp
    Launches a JavaFX app.
    DatabaseController
    Controller for the inventory management view.
    Db
     
    dbSetup
    Loads database credentials from a local .env file.
    DotenvLoader
    Loads environment variables from a {.env} file.
    Employee
     
    EmployeeDao
     
    EmployeeTabHelper
    Handles all Employees-tab logic, extracted from ManagerController.
    InventoryItem
    Model class representing a single row from the Inventory table.
    LoginController
     
    Main
    JavaFX application entry point for the manager-facing POS login interface.
    ManagerController
     
    MenuItem
     
    MenuItemDao
     
    menuItemRow
    Table row model for menu items displayed in the cashier menu table.
    orderItem
    Domain model representing a single item in an in-progress cashier order.
    orderItemRow
    Table row model for order items displayed in the cashier order table.
    ReportTabHelper
